learnLanguage.title: Funda Ulimi
learnLanguage.description: Thola ubuhle bezilimi zase-Afrika uxhumane namasiko ahlukahlukene kulo lonke izwekazi.

exploreIdentity.title: Hlola ubunikazi nesiko
exploreIdentity.description: Vumbulula uhambo nezinyathelo ezakha amasiko ahlukahlukene ase-Afrika futhi ahlanganisa abantu bayo ngesikhathi.

streamFolklore.title: Bukela izinganekwane, umculo, nokuxoxa izindaba
streamFolklore.description: Vumbulula izimpande zobunikazi base-Afrika namasiko angunaphakade adluliswa ezizukulwaneni.

about2.title: Mayelana ne-Magical Africa
about2.description: I-Magical Africa igubha ubuhle, isiko, nezindaba ze-Afrika. Sibonisa amasiko acebi ezwekazi, izindawo ezihlukahlukene, nomoya ophilayo, sabelana ngokwenza i-Afrika ibe yimlingo ngempela.

maasaiBracelets.title: Amasongo amaMaasai
maasaiBracelets.description: Amasongo amaMaasai anebuhlalu abonisa isiko nobuciko.

beadedJewelery.title: Ubucwebe bebuhlalu
beadedJewelery.description: Ubucwebe bamatshe obenziwel esandleni nobuhle bemvelo.

maasaiNecklaces.title: Amaketanga amaMaasai
maasaiNecklaces.description: Amaketanga ebuhlalu amaMaasai endabuko anemibala ephilayo.

ankaraGown.title: Isigqoko se-Ankara
ankaraGown.description: Yenziwe ngendwangu ye-Ankara, igqokwa emasikweni amaningi aseNigeria.

maasaiLeso.title: I-Leso yamaMaasai
maasaiLeso.description: Igqokwa ngabesilisa nabesifazane bamaMaasai eKenya naseTanzania.

kitenge.title: I-Kitenge
kitenge.description: Yenziwe ngendwangu yekotini enezithombe ezicwebezelayo yabesilisa nabesifazane.

traditionalSpears.title: Imikhonto Yendabuko
traditionalSpears.description: Imikhonto eyenziwe ngesandla esetshenziswa amaqhawe emlandweni.

stringInstruments.title: Izinsimbi Zentambo
stringInstruments.description: Izinsimbi zentambo ezenziwe ngesandla ezinomsindo ohlukile.

windInstruments.title: Izinsimbi Zomoya
windInstruments.description: Imitshingo nezimpondo zendabuko ezenziwe ngezinto zemvelo.

languages.title: Funda Ezinye Zezilimi Zethu
languages.description: I-Afrika ikhaya lezinkulungwane zezilimi, ngayinye iphethe umlando, ubunikazi, nesiko. Hlola ukubingelela namagama avamile avela emiphakathini ehlukahlukene yase-Afrika uxhumane nezwekazi ngolimi.

tribes.title: Hlola Izizwe Zethu
tribes.subtitle: Uhambo olungezizwe ezahlukahlukene ze-Afrika namasiko angunaphakade

oromo.name: Oromo
oromo.description: Abakhe e-Ethiopia, abantu base-Oromo baphethe ifa lokuziqhenya lesiko, ubunye, nobunikazi besiko. Bayisizwe esikhulu kunazo zonke ezweni, benza cishe ingxenye yesithathu yabantu abangu-40 million.

zulu.name: Zulu
zulu.description: Abavela eNingizimu Afrika, abantu bamaZulu baphethe ifa elinamandla lesiko, ukubekezela, nobunikazi, bemele abantu abangaphezu kuka-11 million.

igbo.name: Igbo
igbo.description: Abakhe eNigeria, abantu bama-Igbo bangesinye sezizwe ezinkulu ezweni, bebala ngaphezu kuka-30 million, baziwa ngamasiko abo acebi, ubusomabhizinisi, nezimilo zomphakathi eziqinile.

socialImpact.title: Umthelela Wethu Emphakathini
socialImpact.description: Sikholelwa ekubuyiseleni emiphakathini esigqugquzelayo. Ngenkundla yethu, sisekela izingcweti zendawo, silondoloza ifa lamasiko, futhi sidala amathuba ezomnotho e-Afrika yonke.

artisans.title: Ukusekela Izingcweti Zendawo
artisans.description: Sixhumanisa izingcweti zendawo ngokuqondile nezimakethe zomhlaba, siqinisekisa ukuthi zithola inkokhelo efanele ngomsebenzi wazo.

heritage.title: Ukulondoloza Ifa
heritage.description: Imibhalo yethu yedijithali isiza ukulondoloza izilimi ezisengozini, amasiko, nemikhuba yamasiko yezizukulwane ezizayo.

partners.title: Abalingani Bethu
partners.description: Sibambisana nezinhlangano ezihlanganyela umbono wethu wokulondoloza nokugubha isiko lase-Afrika. Ndawonye, senza umthelela omkhulu.

whatIs.question: Iyini i-Magical Africa?
whatIs.answer: I-Magical Africa iyinkundla ezinikele ekulondolozeni, ukugubheni, nokwabelana ngefa elicebi lamasiko e-Afrika nomhlaba. Sixhumanisa abantu namasiko ase-Afrika angempela, izilimi, amasiko, nemiphakathi.

contribute.question: Ngingahlanganyela kanjani ku-Magical Africa?
contribute.answer: Ungahlanganyela ngokwabelana ngezindaba, izithombe, noma ulwazi ngomphakathi wakho. Vele ubhalise bese usebenzisa amathuluzi ethu okuhlanganyela ukuze ungeze okuqukethwe ngamasiko, ulimi, nefa lesizwe sakho.

authentic.question: Ingabe okuqukethwe ku-Magical Africa kungokoqobo?
authentic.answer: Yebo! Konke okuqukethwe kwethu kutholakala ngokuqondile kumalungu omphakathi nachwepheshe bamasiko. Sisebenza ngokubambisana nemiphakathi yendawo ukuqinisekisa ukunemba nobuqiniso kukho konke esikwabelanayo.

learnLanguage.question: Ngingayifunda kanjani ulimi lwase-Afrika kule nkundla?
learnLanguage.answer: Sinikeza izinsiza zokufunda ulimi okuhlanganisa amagama avamile, ukuphimisela ngomsindo okuvela kubantu abakhuluma ulimi lwabo, nomongo wamasiko ukukusiza uqonde futhi ukhonze izilimi zase-Afrika.

purchase.question: Ngingakwazi ukuthenga imikhiqizo yase-Afrika yangempela?
purchase.answer: Yebo! Imakethe yethu inemikhiqizo yamasiko yangempela eyenziwe ngesandla izingcweti zase-Afrika. Ukuthenga ngakunye kusekela imiphakathi yendawo futhi kusiza ukulondoloza ubungcweti bendabuko.

contact.description: Unemibuzo mayelana namasiko ase-Afrika, ifa, noma imiqoqo yethu? Sithinte uthole izindaba, amasiko, nobuciko obenza i-Afrika ibe ngeyodwa. Singathanda ukuxhumana nawe nokwabelana ngemlingo wangempela we-Afrika.

footer.tagline: Lapho Indaba Yangempela Yase-Afrika Ihlala Khona

auth.joinTextEnd: futhi uthole amasiko e-Afrika, ifa, izindaba, namasiko.

explore.title: Hlola I-Afrika Yangempela
explore.description: Thola amasiko acebi, amasiko, nezindaba ezivela kulo lonke izwekazi endaweni eyodwa.

connect.title: Xhumana Nefa
connect.description: Zizwe i-Afrika ngabantu bayo, izizwe, namasiko angunaphakade, akhethelwe ngokunakekela.

travel.title: Hamba Ngaphezu Kokujwayelekile
travel.description: Vula izindawo ezingavamile nokuhlangenwe nakho kwamasiko okudlula indlela evamile yezivakashi.

errors.passwordLength: Iphasiwedi kufanele ibe nezinhlamvu okungenani ezingu-6

hero.title: Hlola Imiphakathi Yase-Afrika
hero.subtitle: Thola ukuhlukahluka okucebile kwamasiko, amasiko, nefa lase-Afrika kulo lonke izwekazi.

section.title: Imiphakathi Yase-Afrika
section.subtitle: Hlola amasiko ahlukahlukene, amasiko, nezindaba zemiphakathi yase-Afrika evela ezwenikazi lonke.

contribute.title: Ingabe Umphakathi Wakho Awukho?
contribute.description: Sisize ukulondoloza nokwabelana ngesiko lakho. Engeza indaba yesizwe sakho, amasiko, ulimi, nefa ku-Magical.Africa.

maasai.name: Maasai
maasai.desc: Amaqhawe ahamba ngezindawo ezihlukene adume ngamasiko nokugqoka okuhlukile.

ashanti.name: Ashanti
ashanti.desc: Badume ngobuciko babo begolide neMbuso enamandla yase-Ashanti.

hausa.name: Hausa
hausa.desc: Elinye lamaqembu amakhulu e-Afrika, elidume ngokuhweba nokuthengisa.

zulu.name: Zulu
zulu.desc: Badume ngesiko lamaqhawe, ukwenza ubuhlalu, noMbuso odumile wamaZulu.

yoruba.name: Yoruba
yoruba.desc: Bacebe ngemithology, ubuciko, namadolobha akudala njengo-Ife no-Oyo.

kikuyu.name: Kikuyu
kikuyu.desc: Iqembu elikhulu kunawo wonke eKenya, elidume ngezolimo nokuhweba.

igbo.name: Igbo
igbo.desc: Badume ngomoya wabo wobusomabhizinisi namasiko acebi obuciko ezizukulwaneni.

amhara.name: Amhara
amhara.desc: Iqembu elinamandla ngokomlando e-Ethiopia elinefa lamaKristu lasendulo.

berber.name: Berber
berber.desc: Abantu bendabuko base-North Africa abanesiko nezilimi zasendulo.

swahili.name: Swahili
swahili.desc: Abantu basogwini abadume ngokuhweba ngolwandle nokuhlangana kwamasiko amakhulu eminyaka.

wolof.name: Wolof
wolof.desc: Iqembu elikhulu eSenegal elidume ngokwamukela nobunye balo.

fulani.name: Fulani
fulani.desc: Abelusi abahambayo abasabalele eWest Africa abanesiko elihlukile.

history.title: Umlando Nokufuduka
history.p1: AmaMaasai ayisizwe saseNilotic esihlala enyakatho, maphakathi naseningizimu yeKenya nasenyakatho yeTanzania. Bangaphakathi kwabantu bendawo abaziwa kakhulu emhlabeni ngenxa yokuhlala kwabo eduze neziqiwi eziningi zezilwane zeGreat Lakes yase-Afrika namasiko abo nokugqoka okwehlukile.
history.p2: AmaMaasai akhuluma ulimi lwesiMaa, ilungu lomndeni wezilimi zeNilotic oluhlobene noDinka noNuer. Baziwa ngesiko labo eliyingqayizivele, amasiko, nokugqoka, kanye nodumo lwabo njengamaqhawe anamandla nabafuyi bezinkomo. AmaMaasai agcine indlela yokuphila yawo yendabuko naphezu kwengcindezi evela ekuthuthukisweni kwanamuhla.

identity.title: Ubuwena Nendlela Yokuphila
identity.description: AmaMaasai angabafuyi abahamba-hamba abathembele ezinkomeni, ezimvwini, nasezimbuzini ukuze baphile. Izinkomo zibaluleke kakhulu esikweni lamaaMaasai, zimele ingcebo, isimo, nokudla. AmaMaasai alinganisa ingcebo yendoda ngenani lezinkomo nezingane anazo.

language.title: Ulimi
language.description: Ulimi lwesiMaa luwulimi lwendabuko lwabantu baseMaasai base-East Africa. Lukhulunywa kakhulu eKenya nasenyakatho yeTanzania, futhi lungowomndeni wezilimi zeNilotic. IsiMaa akuyona nje indlela yokuxhumana — linendima ebalulekile ekulondolozeni isiko lamaaMaasai, ubuwena, namasiko omlomo.

audio.title: Lalela Ukubingelela Kwendabuko
audio.description: Funda ukuphimisa kwesiMaa okuyiqiniso ngokuqondile kubantu abakhuluma ulimi lwebele, ulondoloza imisindo yangempela, isigqi, nencazelo yamasiko yolimi lwesiMaasai.

clothing.title: Izingubo Zendabuko Nokuhlobisa
clothing.description: AmaMaasai adume ngezingubo zawo ezibomvu eziyingqayizivele ezibizwa ngokuthi "shuka." Okubomvu kuwumbala obaluleke kakhulu, omele isibindi, ubunye, negazi. Amadoda nabesifazane bagqoka ubucwebe bebuhlalu obuhle, imibala nemidwebo ehlukene ekhombisa iminyaka, isimo somshado, nesikhundla emphakathini.

eunoto.title: Eunoto
eunoto.desc: Umcimbi wokukhula lapho amaqhawe eguquka abe abadala abancane

emuratare.title: Emuratare
emuratare.desc: Umcimbi wokusoka ophawula ukuguquka kube yiqhawe

laibonLenana.name: Laibon Lenana
laibonLenana.desc: Umholi wezomoya waseMaasai onamandla owadlala indima ebalulekile ngesikhathi sokuhlwitha kweBrithani.

olonana.name: Olonana
olonana.desc: Inkosi noLaibon owaxoxisana ngezivumelwano zokuvikela amazwe aseMaasai.

mbatian.name: Mbatian
mbatian.desc: ULaibon odume kakhulu, owaziwa ngeziprofetho zakhe nangokuhlanganisa amaMaasai.

oleSaibul.name: Ole Saibul
oleSaibul.desc: Isopolitiki saseMaasai esidumile nomuntu omela amalungelo abafuyi eKenya.

oleNtimama.name: William Ole Ntimama
oleNtimama.desc: Isopolitiki saseKenya esalwela amalungelo omhlaba wamaMaasai iminyaka eminingi.

oleLenku.name: Joseph Ole Lenku
oleLenku.desc: UNdunankulu wamanje weKajiado County nowayenguNobhala weKhabhinethi.

nature.title: Ubudlelwano Nemvelo
nature.description: AmaMaasai ahlala ngokuthula nezilwane zasendle amakhulu eminyaka, ehlanganyela indawo efanayo yemvelo namabhubesi, izindlovu, nezilwane zasendle ezinye. Indlela yabo yokuphila yokufuya nezinkolelo zendabuko kusize ukulondoloza izindawo ezinkulu zasendle.

cattle.name: Izinkomo
cattle.desc: Isipho esingcwele esivela ku-Enkai (uNkulunkulu), esibalulekile ebuwenini nasekuphileni kwamaMaasai

lions.name: Amabhubesi
lions.desc: Ahlonishwa njengezimpawu zesibindi; emlandweni azingeli amaqhawe emiciimbini yokukhula

elephants.name: Izindlovu
elephants.desc: Zihlonishwa ngokuhlakanipha namandla; zivikelwa ngokugcinwa kwendabuko

giraffes.name: Izindlulamithi
giraffes.desc: Zibonwa njengezidalwa ezinomusa ezihlanganyela amazwe azo okudla

antiques.title: Izinto Zendabuko Nezasendulo
antiques.description: Abantu baseMaasai benze amathuluzi ayingqayizivele, izikhali, nokuhlobisa amakhulu eminyaka. Lezi zinto zimele ifa labo elicebile lamasiko futhi ziyaqhubeka ziyizimpawu zobuwena nesiko.

rungu.name: Rungu (Isagila Sokujikijela)
rungu.desc: Isagila sokhuni lwendabuko elisetshenziswa amaqhawe ukuvikela nokuzingela

shuka.name: Shuka (Indwangu Ebomvu)
shuka.desc: Indwangu ebomvu eyaziwayo egqokwa njengengubo yendabuko

beadedJewelry.name: Ubucwebe Bebuhlalu
beadedJewelry.desc: Umsebenzi webuhlalu onzima omele isimo, iminyaka, nobuwena

spear.name: Umkhonto (Enkudi)
spear.desc: Uphawu lobudoda nesikhali esiyinhloko samaqhawe aseMaasai

shield.name: Isihlangu (Olongu)
shield.desc: Izihlangu eziyindilinga ezipendwe ngemidwebo eyingqayizivele emele ubuwena bomndeni

calabash.name: Iselwa (Enkukuri)
calabash.desc: Izitsha zeselwa ezisetshenziselwa ukugcina ingxube yobisi negazi

preserve.title: Sisisize Ukulondoloza Ifa LamaMaasai
preserve.description: Unezindaba, izithombe, noma ulwazi ozokwabelana ngalo ngesiko lamaMaasai?

hero.title: Mayelana ne-Magical Africa
hero.tagline: Ukulondoloza Izilimi ZaseAfrika. Ukuhlomisa imiphakathi. Ukwakha ikusasa.

background.paragraph1: Magical.africa iyinhlangano ye-Pan-African esebenza lapho kuhlangana khona izilimi zaseAfrika, amasiko, imfundo, nobuchwepheshe. Sikhona ukusekela ukuqhubeka kokusetshenziswa, ukukhula, nokusimama kwezilimi zemiphakathi kulo lonke izwekazi.
background.paragraph2: Izilimi zaseAfrika zibalulekile emfundweni, ezimpilweni, nasekuxhumaneni komphakathi, kodwa eziningi zisalele emuva ezinhlelweni ezisemthethweni nasezindaweni zedijithali. I-Magical Africa ibhekana naleli gebe ngendlela egxile emphakathini nobambiswano ehlanganisa abanikazi bolwazi bendawo, othisha, abacwaningi, nababambisani bobuchwepheshe.
background.paragraph3: Ngokusebenzisa ubuchwepheshe njengethuluzi elikusizayo hhayi esikhundleni sisiza ukuhlanganisa izilimi zaseAfrika nolwazi lwamasiko ezinhlelweni zanamuhla ngezindlela ezinobulungiswa, ezihlanganisa wonke umuntu, nezisimeme.

approach.title: Indlela Yethu
approach.description: Sihlanganisa amasiko, ubuchwepheshe, nemfundo ukuhlomisa imiphakathi nokulondoloza ifa laseAfrika.

items.sustainableImpact: Imakethe Yezinto Zakudala Nezinto Zokwakha Zase-Afrika Ezikhethekile

datastewardship.title: Ukuphatha Idatha Yezilimi Namasiko AseAfrika
datastewardship.description: Sibambisana nemiphakathi ukubhala, ukuphatha, nokulondoloza izilimi namasiko aseAfrika ngezindlela ezihlonipha izimiso zendawo, umlando, nezinto ezibalulekile. Umsebenzi wethu uhlanganisa:
items: Ukubhala izilimi eziningi ezindaweni ezahlukene zaseAfrika

aiDataCollection.title: Ukuqoqa Idatha Ye-AI Egxile Emphakathini
aiDataCollection.description: I-Magical Africa yakha futhi ihole izinqubo zokuqoqa idatha ezinobulungiswa eziholwa umphakathi ezisekela ukuthuthukiswa kwe-AI ehlanganisa izilimi zaseAfrika. Sigxila:

education.title: Imisebenzi Yemfundo Nolwazi Lwamasiko
education.description: Sisebenza ezikoleni, ezindaweni zokufunda, nasezindaweni zamasiko ezifundeni ezahlukene zaseAfrika ukusekela ukufunda ulimi, ukudlulisa ulwazi, nokushintshisana phakathi kwezizukulwane. Sigxila:

principles.title: Izimiso Zethu
items: I-Pan-African ngohlelo - Igxile endaweni, ixhunywe izwekazi lonke
Umphakathi Kuqala - Imiphakathi ingababambisani, hhayi imithombo yedatha
Ubulungiswa Ngokuzenzakalelayo - Imvume, ukulunga, nobumfihlo akuxoxiswana ngakho
Ukuhlonipha Amasiko - Ulimi namasiko kuyizinhlelo eziphilayo
Okuvulekile Nokubambisana - Sisekela ulwazi oluvulekile nokufunda ndawonye
I-AI Egxile Kubantu - Ubuchwepheshe kumele busebenzele abantu, hhayi ukubathatha

research.title: Ucwaningo Nokuhlola Ikhwalithi Okusizwa Yi-AI
items: Sekela ukuhlola ikhwalithi njalo kuhambisana nokuqinisekiswa ngabantu

communityTools.title: Amathuluzi Aqhutshwa Umphakathi
items: Amathuluzi emfundo adinga izwi nezinhlobo ezahlukene

gloria.name: Gloria Machoka
gloria.bio: UGloria wasungula iMagical Africa ngenhloso yokulondoloza izilimi zase-Afrika, ukugubha amasiko, nokunika amandla entsheni ngokufunda, ubuciko, nomphakathi.

steve.name: Steve Kombo
steve.bio: Unothando lokuhola umgomo wokulondoloza izindaba zase-Afrika nokwakha izikhala zedijithali ezixhumanisa abantu, izilimi, namagugu.

joel.name: Joel Makori
joel.bio: Uchwepheshe wolimi lwesiLuo ogxile ekusetshenzisweni kolimi oluqondile nasezindabeni zomlomo zomphakathi.

Edewait.name: Edewait Eric
Edewait.bio: Uhola ukuthuthukiswa kokuqukethwe ngokucwaninga izilimi zendabuko, ukuqopha amagama nezindaba ezisengozini, nokuvikela incazelo yesiko kuwo wonke umphakathi weMagical Africa.

lorna.name: Lorna Wanderi
lorna.bio: Udizayina isipiliyoni somsebenzisi esicacile nesijabulisayo esenza ukufunda izilimi zase-Afrika nokuhlola amasiko kube lula, kufinyeleleka, futhi kujabulise.

ian.name: Ian Cheruiyot
ian.bio: Ukwakha ubuchwepheshe bezilimi obusiza ukulondoloza nokucubungula izilimi zase-Afrika, uguqula idatha yezilimi ibe amathuluzi asekela ukufunda, ukuhumusha, nokulondoloza isiko.

collins.name: Collins Omondi
collins.bio: Ukwakha izinhlelo ezihlakaniphile ezisekela ukufunda ngokwezifiso, izincomo, nezici ezisebenzisa i-AI kuwo wonke amapulatifomu eMagical Africa.

cta.title: Sijoyine Ekulondolozeni Indaba YaseAfrika Yeqiniso
cta.description: I-Afrika ayidingi ukuchazwa ngabantu bangaphandle. Sizoxoxa indaba yethu ngokwethu ngesithunzi, ngokunemba, ngokukhiqiza, nangokuziqhenya.

phrases.title: Izaga
phrases.description: Inkulumo ebonisa ukuthi ukufuna ukwazi, uma kungalawulwa, kungaholela emkhakheni ozingozini.
phrases.teaching: Imibuzo ethile noma izenzo zingaletha inkinga.

music.title: Umculo Wamasiko
music.intro: Umculo wase-Afrika ungomunye wemikhuba yomculo emidala kakhulu emhlabeni, othandwe kakhulu ekuphileni komphakathi ngemicimbi, imibungazo, ukuxoxa izindaba, ukudansa, nezinqubo zokomoya.

events.title: Imicimbi Yamasiko
events.intro: Imicimbi yamasiko yase-Afrika igubha ifa ngokuhlanganisa imiphakathi ngomculo, ukudansa, ubuciko, ukudla, nokuxoxa izindaba, ihlonipha isiko ngenkathi yamukela ubunikazi bamanje base-Afrika.
events.festivalDescription: Umgubho weviki elilodwa onezikhombisa zokudansa kwesintu, izindilinga zamasumba, imibukiso yobuciko, nokudla kwe-Afrika kweqiniso okuvela ezwenikazi lonke.

popularCourses.title: Izifundo zethu
popularCourses.subtitle: Hlola izikhungo ezahlukene ezifundiswa othisha base-Afrika abanentshisekelo — kusuka ezikhunjini zendabuko kuya ezintweni zasemiphakathini, kukhona okuthile kuwo wonke umuntu.
popularCourses.potteryDesc: Funda ubuciko bendabuko bokwenza izitsha ngezandla nangegalavasi. Yenza izindishi, amavazi, nezitsha zemvelo zase-Afrika ezidluliselwe ezizukulwaneni.
popularCourses.instrumentMakingDesc: Yenza izinsimbi zomculo zase-Afrika — kusuka esigubhwini se-djembe kuya e-kora. Qonda ukwakhiwa kwamawindi, izinto ezisetshenziswa, nokubaluleka kwamasiko kwazo.
popularCourses.weavingDesc: Thola ubuciko bokwenza izintendane zase-Afrika nezindwangu. Funda imifanekiso yendabuko, izibopho zemvelo, nezindaba ezinunwayo.
popularCourses.cookingDesc: Hlola izinambitheko ezehlukene zokudla kwase-Afrika. Funda ukupheka izidlo zendabuko — kusuka ku-pilau yaseKenya kuya ku-jollof yase-Afrika Ntshonalanga.
popularCourses.woodCarvingDesc: Thola ubuciko bokugawula izinto ngemithi yase-Afrika — kusuka kumikhonto nezithombe kuya ezintweni zasekhaya. Funda ukufunda umqamelo, amacebo ezinhlang, nencazelo yomoya.

culture.description: Izikhungo zamasikoase-Afrika zigubha ifa ngokuhlanganisa imiphakathi ngomculo, ukudansa, ubuciko, ukudla, nokulandisa izindaba — ihlonipha amasiko ngenkathi igona ubunikazi baseAfrika banamuhla.

hero.description: Kusuka ezintweni ezivame ukuqaliswa ukukhankanywa emabhidini kuya empahla eyenziwe ngesandla izindlunkulu zendawo — thola ingxenye yamasiko aphilayo ezweni.

shop.title: Thenga Uqoqo
shop.subtitle: Imikhiqizo yeqiniso eyenziwe izindlunkulu zendawo kulo lonke izwekazi

auctions.title: Amabhidi Aphilayo
auctions.subtitle: Bida izinto eziyigugu ze-Afrika, amashokobezi, nezinto zamasiko

item1.name: Ibhodi Lethusi le-Benin Lekhulu Leminyaka le-19
item1.description: Ibhodi eliyigugu kakhulu lethusi livela eNdlunkulu yase-Benin, libonisa ibutho elimkhulu lasebukhosini ngengubo yemikhosi. Umsuka uqinisekisiwe.

item2.name: Imaski Yemikhosi yoMbuso wase-Kuba
item2.description: Imaski yemikhosi eqoshwe ngangesandla evela eNdaweni Yentando Yeningi yase-Congo.

item3.name: I-Oud Yase-Swahili Yakudala
item3.description: I-oud eyenziwe ngesandla yekhulu leminyaka le-19 evela ogwini lwase-Swahili, enenhlonipho yokusika.

artisans.title: Izindlunkulu Ezikhethiwe
artisans.subtitle: Abantu beqiniso, ubuciko beqiniso — ukuthenga ngakunye kusekela indlunkulu yendawo ngokuqondile

newsletter.title: Ungaphuthi Lutho
newsletter.subtitle: Thola isaziso lapho izindlunkulu ezintsha zidweba izinto nokuthi amabhidi aphilayo aqala nini

hero.description: Kusuka emakhosini ombhiyozo wezigubhu e-Sahel kuya ebusuku obukhazimulayo basemasikweni e-Lagos - ngena enhliziyweni ephilayo yezwekazi

byMonth.title: Thola Izikhungo Ngenyanga
byMonth.subtitle: Bhrowuza izikhungo zamasiko ase-Afrika ezenzeka unyaka wonke
byMonth.selectPrompt: 👆 Khetha inyanga engenhla ukuze ubone izikhungo

event1.name: Isigcawu i-Bushfire
event1.description: Ukuhlangana okumangalisayo kwamaziko nabadlali base-Afrika eMbusweni wase-Eswatini. Umculo, ukuxoxa izindaba, nomoya womphakathi endaweni yentaba eyodwa.

event2.name: Isigcawu i-Odwira
event2.description: Abantu base-Ashanti base-Ghana bahlanza izihlalo zabo banikelele abaphansi kulomkhosi osingethwe izinsuku eziyisikhombisa ogcwele izinqumo, ukugida, ukushaya izigubhu, ukucula nokudla.

hero.subtitle: Kusuka emsindweni wamandulo wedjembe kuze kufike ukuphakama kwe-Afrobeats ne-Amapiano — thola izwi elabumba izwe.

explore.title: Hlola
explore.subtitle: Thola izwi zase-Afrika, izitali, izinto zokushaya umculo kanye nomthelela womhlaba

genre1.name: Afrobeats
genre1.description: Isenzakalo somhlaba wonke esihlanganisa i-highlife, i-funk, ne-hip-hop. Yazalwa eLagos, i-Afrobeats isikhulile yaba enye yezindlela ezinamandla kakhulu zomculo emhlabeni — imisindo ephelelwayo eyaphatha izindawo zokudansa kusuka eNairobi kuze kufike eNew York.
genre1.artists: Burna Boy, Wizkid, Davido, Tems, Omah Lay

genre2.name: Amapiano
genre2.description: Ukuxuba okukhethekile kwe-deep house, i-jazz, nokukhala kwengoma yomuthi. Yazalwa emizini yase-Soweto, i-Amapiano isasazekile kulo lonke izwe futhi manje ilawula izinhla zamazwe kanye nezinkundla zokusakaza umculo.
genre2.artists: Kabza De Small, DJ Maphorisa, Tyler ICU, Focalistic

genre3.name: Benga
genre3.description: Isitayela somculo sase-Kenya — imisindo engaguquki yegitare lase-acoustic ebekwe phezu kwezindlela zomculo lwesiLuo. I-Benga isisekelo somculo odumile wase-Kenya neyisenzo esingachazeki sase-Afrika eMpumalanga.
genre3.artists: D.O. Misiani, Ochieng Kabaselleh, Victoria Kings

genre4.name: Highlife
genre4.description: Esinye sezinhlobo zasendulo zomculo wase-Afrika, ehlanganisa izwi zebhande lethusi nezindlela zabantu baseGhana. Ekhethekile, ejabulisayo, nengapheliyo — inhlobo eyabeka isisekelo somculo owanengi wase-Afrika eNtshonalanga.
genre4.artists: E.T. Mensah, Amakye Dede, Daddy Lumba

instruments.title: Izinto Zomculo
instruments.subtitle: Izinto zasendulo zezwi ezinikeza amakhulu eminyaka ensikazi nezindaba

kora.name: Kora
kora.description: I-harp-lute enezikhala eziyi-21 evela e-Afrika eNtshonalanga. Umculo wezitshali — abalandi balokhu kanye nabalandi bezimbali.

djembe.name: Djembe
djembe.description: Ingoma edumile emhlabeni evela eGuinea. Ibaluleke emcimbini nasekugujweni komphakathi.

mbira.name: Mbira
mbira.description: Ipiyano lesikhomba sase-Zimbabwe — umculo womoya osetshenziswa ukuxhumana nokhokho.

talkingDrum.name: Ingoma Esikhulumayo
talkingDrum.description: Ingoma enegama like-i-hour-glass elingitha izilimi zemsindo, esetshenziswa ukuxhumana kude.

krar.name: Krar
krar.description: I-lyre enezikhala ezinhlanu evela e-Ethiopia nase-Eritrea enemsindo onamandla onganyelwe ngamasiko asendulo.

balafon.name: Balafon
balafon.description: I-xylophone yomuthi ethandwayo eMali, eSenegal, naseCôte d'Ivoire.

artists.title: Izitali
artists.subtitle: Izinganekwane nezinkanyezi eziphakama kulo lonke izwekazi

artist1.description: Ubaba we-Afrobeat. Umculo wakhe wawuyimpinduko, wezombusazwe, futhi awupheli.

artist2.description: "Mama Africa" — izwi lobuhle nokumelana elivakalalise emhlabeni wonke.

artist3.description: Isinqobi se-Grammy esaletha i-Afrobeats kuyo yonke izwekazi.

artist4.description: Izwi elachaza isizukulwane esihlanganisa i-soul, i-R&B, ne-Afrobeats.

artist5.description: Waqinisekisa ukuxhumana okujulile phakathi komculo wase-Afrika eNtshonalanga ne-blues yase-Amerika.

artist6.description: Esinye sezwi ezidumile kakhulu e-Afrika, ehlanganisa amasiko amaWolof nezwi lomhlaba.

artist7.description: Waqinisekisa ukuxhumana okujulile phakathi komculo wase-Afrika eNtshonalanga ne-blues yase-Amerika.

influence.title: Umthelela
influence.subtitle: Ukuthi imisindo yase-Afrika yalubumba kanjani umculo omhlaba wonke owuzwa

jazz.name: Jazz & Blues
jazz.description: Izilinganiso ze-pentatonic, imiqondo yokuphendula-nokukhuluma, nokuxuba ngobuciko komculo wase-Afrika ngezigaba zikhokho be-Jazz ne-Blues.

reggae.name: Reggae
reggae.description: I-reggae yaseJamaica ithwala ilifa elinzulu lemisindo yase-Afrika ngomgqele, ne-Rastafari ixhumeke ngokusobala emilandweni yase-Ethiopia.

hiphop.name: Hip-Hop
hiphop.description: Isiko legriot lolwimi lwezinkulumo, ukulanda izindaba, nokuphendula-nokukhuluma lamukelwa kabanzi njengoyisemkhulu woMoya we-hip-hop.

electronic.name: Umculo we-Electronic
electronic.description: Kusuka e-Amapiano kuye e-Afrobeats, izakhiwo zemisindo yase-Afrika zibumba kabusha isiko lamaklabhu emhlabeni wonke kanye nokwenziwa kwe-pop enkulu.

hero.description: Hlola umlando omuhle wase-Afrika ngezifundo zethu ze-inthanethi.

languages.heading: Funda Izilimi ZaseAfrika
languages.subtitle: Khuluma njengomuntu wendawo! Gqoka izilimi zase-Afrika.

community.heading: Joyina Umphakathi Wethu Wobukrelekrele
community.subtitle: Xhumana Nabafundisi, Hlangana Nabafundi, Yabelana Ngesiko Lakho

featured.title: Ubuciko Bokuxoxa Izindaba ZaseAfrika
featured.excerpt: Thola amasiko anamandla okuxoxa izindaba ngomlomo nawo umsebenzi wawo ekwakheni ubunikazi, umlando, nomphakathi kulo lonke izwekazi laseAfrika.

beadwork.title: Ukwenza Umhlobiso Wamazhe
beadwork.subtitle: Ukwenza Umhlobiso Omuhle Okhuthazwa Ilifa LaseAfrika

helmet.title: Ubuchwepheshe | Magical Africa
helmet.description: Thola ukuthi Magical Africa isebenzisa kanjani i-AI yayo ukugcina izilimi ezingaphezu kuka-2,000 zase-Afrika, ukudijithayiza ilifa lomlomo, nokunikeza ukufunda kwamasiko.
helmet.keywords: ubuchwepheshe Magical Africa, i-AI yase-Afrika, i-AI yezilimi zase-Afrika, ukugcinwa kwezilimi zase-Afrika
helmet.ogTitle: Magical Africa — Ubuchwepheshe be-AI Belifa lase-Afrika
helmet.ogDescription: Amamodeli e-AI akhiwa ngokukhethekile ngebunjalo bezilimi zase-Afrika nokujula kwamasiko.

hero.subtitle: Amamodeli akhethekile akhiwe ngokukhethekile ngebunjalo bezilimi zase-Afrika, ukujula kwamasiko, nokugcinwa kwezilimi ezingaphezu kuka-2,000 — ezadingelwanga yi-AI evamile isikhathi eside.

intro.title: Inkinga Esiyixazululayo
intro.description: Izilimi zase-Afrika zimelela ngaphansi kuka-1% yawo wonke umqukathi wedijithali. Njengoba amadlozi edlula, ikhulu leminyaka lwobulumko luyanyamalala nazo. Magical Africa isebenzisa i-AI ukuguqula lokhu.
intro.quote: Ukugcina ubulumko babadala ngenxa yabantwana basekhomkhulu.

features.sectionSubtitle: Izinhlelo eziyisithupha ze-AI ezisebenza ndawonye ukugcina nokuFundisa ilifa lase-Afrika.

speech.title: Ukuhlonza Inkulumo
speech.description: Amamodeli e-AI aqeqeshwe ezilimini ezineithoni zase-Afrika namazwe — izilimi ezivame ukwadingelwa yizinkundla ezivamile. Amamodeli ethu ayaqonda izithinta ezehlukene ezenza ulimi ngalunye lube lwekhethekile.

transcription.title: Ukubhala Izikhulumi
transcription.description: Ukudijithayiza ngokuzenzakalelayo kwezinganekwane zezikhulumi — ukuguqula ilifa elikhulunywayo elivela kubadala lube umbhalo ongasetshenziswa, ugcinwe, noshiyelanwayo.

indexing.title: Ukuhlelwa Kwamasiko
indexing.description: I-AI ye-semantic ehlanganisa izaga, izindaba zomlando, nolwazi lwamasiko ngemiphakathi, isifunda, nenkhathi — ukwenza ilifa lase-Afrika litholakale ngendlela engakaze ibonwe.

recommendations.title: Izincomo Ezihlakaniphile
recommendations.description: Izindlela zokufunda ezikhuthazwa yi-AI ezihlangabeza wonke umsebenzisi nezindaba zamasiko ezihambelana kakhulu, izifundo zolimi, nabakhulumi bezilimi zomdabu.

regeneration.title: Ukudalwa Kabusha Komqukathi
regeneration.description: Ukwakhiwa kabusha komlando wezikhulumi ogcwele izinzwa nge-AI nokujugunyulwa kwendaba zakudala zibe ngumqukathi wesimanje wabantwana.

tools.title: Amathuluzi e-AI Yabaklami
tools.description: Iseti ephelele yamathuluzi enika amandla abadala, izingcweti, nabaxoxi ukushicilela, ukuthola inzuzo, nokugcina ilifa labo ngedijithali — ngaphandle kolwazi lwezobuchwepheshe.

capture.title: Ukuthatha
capture.desc: Abadala, izingcweti nabalandisi babhalisa umqukathi wezikhulumi nge-Magical Africa Creator Platform.

transcribe.title: Ukubhala
transcribe.desc: I-AI yethu Yokuhlonza Inkulumo iguqula izilimi zase-Afrika ezikhulunywayo zibe umbhalo, ibhekana nezinguquko zeithoni namazwe ngokuneliwe.

index.title: Ukuhlelwa
index.desc: I-AI Yokuhlelwa Kwamasiko ihlanganisa futhi inamathelise umqukathi ngolimi, isifunda, isizwe, nesihloko.

deliver.title: Ukuhlinzekwa
deliver.desc: I-AI Yezincomo Ezihlakaniphile inikeza umqukathi ofanele kumfundi ofanele — ngolimi lwabo, ngesivinini sabo, kudivayisi nayiphi.

cta.description: Sisizele ukwakha ingundikhishi enkulu kakhulu yedijithali yolwazi lolimi namasiko ase-Afrika. Noma ungumklami, umfundi, noma umtshalimali — kunendawo yakho e-Magical Africa.

items.subtitle: I-Pan-Afrika nge-Dizayini
items.title: Yakhiwe ngazo zonke izizwe ezingama-54 kanye ne-diaspora yomhlaba
items.detail: Konke esikwakhayo kukhonza ububanzi bonke beqhwele lase-Afrika — awukho amasiko, ulimi, noma isifunda esithatha phambili kulezinye. Kusuka eMpumalanga kuya eNtshonalanga, eNyakatho kuya eNingizimu, nasemiphakathini ye-diaspora eYurophu, eAmericans, nangaphesheya, i-Magical Africa ikhiwe ukumela nokubungaza yonke ingxenye yefa lase-Afrika.

items.subtitle: Ukuphathwa Umphakathi
items.title: Abaklami nemiphakathi banelifa labo
items.detail: Imiphakathi enazo izilimi nezindaba esizigcinayo ihlala nomnikazi ogcwele nenkululeko phezu kokuqukethwe kwayo. Thina singabalindi, hhayi abanikazi. Wonke umuntu omdala, umculi, nomxoxi onikela enkundleni ukhokhelwa ngqo ngomsebenzi wakhe ngamodeli yokwabelana ngemali echaphazelekayo.

items.subtitle: Ukubhekelelwa kwe-AI Ngokwezenhlalo
items.title: I-AI esebenzela amasiko, hhayi ngendlela ephambene
items.detail: Amamodeli ethu e-AI akhiwe ngokugunyazwa umphakathi, ukuzwela kwamasiko, nokuhlolwa ngokuqhubekayo kwamandla amabi kuzo zonke izigaba. Siyenqaba imodeli yokukhokhela idatha ethathayo eyakulimaza imiphakathi eyashiywa eceleni ngemlando. Yonke idatha esiyisebenzisayo isuselwa ngendlela emsulwa nangokugunyazwa ngokucacile.

items.subtitle: Umthelela Oqhubekayo Wesikhathi Eside
items.title: Ukwakha ngenxa yezizukulwane, hhayi izizini
items.detail: Silinganisa impumelelo hhayi ngabasebenzisi benyanga noma imali yesizini, kodwa ngezilimi ezigcinwayo, amadlozi arekodiwe, nabantwana abakhulela bewazi ifa labo. Yonke isinqumo semikhiqizo, ukubambisana, namodeliyo yebhizinisi ihlolwa ngomqondo womthelela wezamasiko wesikhathi eside.

items.subtitle: Ukugcinwa Kwedijithali
items.title: Ukusindisa izilimi zingakulahleka kuze kube phakade
items.detail: Izilimi ezingaphezu kwama-600 zase-Afrika manje zihlonzwa njengezisengozini. Ngaphandle kokuhlanganyela kwedijithali ngokusheshayo, zizonyamalala ngegciwane. I-Magical Africa isebenza ngqo nezingcweti zolimi, amadlozi omphakathi, nezikole zasekhaya ukurekhoda, ukubhala, nokuFundisa lezi zilimi ngasikhathi sinye.

items.subtitle: Ukufinyelela Okwenqabela
items.title: Ifa akumelwe livinjelwe ngemuva kohange lwemali
items.detail: Siyakholelwa ukuthi wonke umuntu wase-Afrika — ngaphandle kwemali yengeniso, indawo, noma ulwazi lwezobuchwepheshe — ufanelwe ukufinyelela efa lakhe lamasiko. Yingakho okuqukethwe kwethu okuyisisekelo sokufunda kumahhala, inkundla yethu isebenza ezixhumanisini eziphansi, futhi ulwazi lwethu lweselula luhlelwe kahle kwizidingo ezisetshenziswa kakhulu kulo lonke elase-Afrika.
